name: Best Mom Ever Heart
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a large plump heart in the center with a ribbon banner across the middle reading BEST MOM EVER, small flowers and sparkles tucked around the edges, a cheerful celebratory feel

name: I Love You Mom Banner
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a flowing ribbon banner spelling out I LOVE YOU MOM in bubbly hand-lettered letters, decorated with a few hearts and a little flower at each end, plenty of open space inside the letters to color

name: Mother's Day Tulip Bouquet
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a bouquet of tall tulips with rounded cup-shaped blooms and long leaves, wrapped in paper and tied with a big bow, a couple of small hearts floating above the flowers

name: Mom and Child Hug
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a smiling mother kneeling to wrap her arms around her happy young child in a warm hug, both with cheerful faces, a few small hearts in the air around them

name: Mother's Day Breakfast in Bed
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a breakfast tray holding a steaming teapot, a cup, a stack of pancakes with a pat of butter, and a small vase with a single flower, a folded napkin and a tiny heart-shaped note on the tray

name: Simple Mother's Day Heart
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: one big bold simple heart filling most of the page with the short word MOM in large rounded letters inside it, a couple of small dots and a tiny flower beside it, very easy and uncluttered for little hands

name: Mom Flower Close-Up
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a single large detailed daisy-like flower seen up close, filling the page, layered petals radiating from a round center, a couple of leaves at the base, the word MOM curving gently across the center

name: Mother's Day Flower Mandala
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a circular mandala built from repeating flowers, petals, hearts, and swirling leaves arranged in symmetrical rings around a small heart at the center, intricate and detailed for older colorists

name: Happy Mother's Day Card
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a folded greeting card shape with HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY in cheerful lettering across the front, framed by a border of small hearts and flowers, a little bow in one corner

name: Number One Mom Trophy
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a shiny award trophy with two handles standing on a base, the number 1 and the word MOM on the front, a small star above it and a couple of sparkle marks, a celebratory ribbon at the foot

name: Mother's Day Teacup and Cupcake
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a cute teacup on a saucer with a heart on the side and gentle steam rising, sitting beside a frosted cupcake topped with a swirl and a little heart, a small flower resting next to them

name: Mom and Baby Animals
subject: holidays/mother-day
prompt: a sweet mother bird in a nest tucking her wing around two small chicks, a leafy branch with a couple of blossoms and a tiny hovering heart, warm and loving expressions
